programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A woman planning for her wedding at a resort meets a charming local right before the ceremony. Starring Andrew W Walker (2015)

programme.title: Stop The Wedding
programme.desc: When a young, single attorney finds out that her charming aunt is getting married to a TV star known as much for his failed marriages as his acting career, she tries to stop the wedding.

programme.title: Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Forced to work together, a wedding planner and an event planner learn that opposites can produce the most unexpected results.

programme.title: Make Me A Match
programme.desc: (2023) Romance starring Rushi Kota. A dating app executive enlists the help of a matchmaker to change her fate in love. However, the matchmaker's son may be the change she needed all along.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: When Elen gets the chance to sign up to the notoriously exclusive dating service Eternity, she clashes with Will, her first date. They make a deal to try and get their money back.

programme.title: Loving Every Minute
programme.desc: (2022) Fantastical romance with Jess Brown. Stephanie inherits a watch that allows her to travel back in time by five minutes, once a day. Will the tricky timepiece help or hinder her in romance?

programme.title: Finding Mr. Right
programme.desc: When popular love and relationship podcaster and future author, Nikki Parsons is dumped by her boyfriend the day before she meets her new publisher, she has to think fast.

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: (2021) Romantic comedy starring Autumn Reeser. A workaholic wellness mogul goes on a retreat in Montana, where she discovers that slowing down might just be the key to finding inner peace - and love.

programme.title: Luckless In Love
programme.desc: Blogger Winnie and sports agent Holden are both dating with the intention to further their career. As their feelings grow, they discover the only people they are lying to are themselves. (2022)

programme.title: The Love Subscription
programme.desc: Lillian comes up with an investment idea to wow her boss but first she must convince her client, Grant her proposal is one he can't refuse. (2022)

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: (2019) Moving romance with Caylee Cowan, Travis Burns and Corbin Bernsen. Ride a rollercoaster of emotions as a devastating accident reveals an incredible true story of love, family, faith and loss.

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring Lesa Wilson. When a filmmaker teams up with a fashion designer to uncover a historic love story, their own sparks start to steal the spotlight.

programme.title: Zoe's Having A Baby
programme.desc: Zoe wants a baby. Single, and tired of the NYC dating scene, she decides to go it alone. She is elated but things get complicated when two eligible bachelors walk in to her life.

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: City lawyer Claire returns home to save her a family's pumpkin farm over a property dispute. The opposing lawyer is Patrick, her high school debate class nemesis. (2019)

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Victoria is in Paris for friend's wedding, but she needs a date to make her ex believe she's over him, will Jacques her childhood French pen pal assist her in this ruse? (2021)
